queryList.1: hp_master: select id, module_activity_id, module_name, module_type, module_ethnicity, `status`, sort, sts, create_time, last_update_time, load_type, background, image_url_before_get, image_url_after_get, image_url_end, sort_rule, is_for_new_user, shop_link_type, shop_category_ids, shop_relation_type, filter_show_type, shop_show_type, market_tag_show_type, single_load_row_size, first_load_row_size, language_code,product_link_type,product_tag_ids,show_price_filter,price_threshold_min,price_threshold_max from module_activity_base where id = 2411 and sts = 1
queryList.2: hp_master: select shop_id, fence_latlng from hp_shop_delivery_fence where shop_id in ( 160288176 , 221864167 ) and delivery_type = 1
queryList.3: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,start_tudustr,target_tudustr,distance,update_time FROM ads_hp_search_distance_matrix WHERE (target_tudustr = '115.954,29.660' AND start_tudustr IN ('115.984,29.668','115.943,29.670'))
queryList.4: hp_master: SELECT DISTINCT s.shop_id,s.shop_name,s.deliveryRange, s.delivery_postcode_info,s.shop_logo,s.recommend_sort, s.auto_open_close,s.is_week_operation,s.is_supermarket, s.shop_status,s.peak_time,s.off_peak_time, a.add_latitude,a.add_city,a.add_longitude, e.praise_average,e.praise_average_manager, e.composite,e.composite_manager,e.shop_evaluation_num, s.shop_type,sea.shop_order_stop_time, sea.preorder_open_type,sea.preorder_closed_support, s.is_week_operation,s.delivery_faraway_type, s.auto_open_close,s.recommend_sort_easi, sea.tobacco_shop,sea.max_delivery_range_meter, sea.easi_max_delivery_range_meter FROM shop s LEFT JOIN address a ON a.add_id = s.address_id LEFT JOIN evaluation e ON e.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN shop_extra_info i on i.shop_id=s.shop_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_site_config ssc on ssc.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_search_middle sea on sea.shop_id = s.shop_id WHERE s.is_del = 0 AND s.audit_status = 1 AND ssc.site = 'HP' and ssc.visible = 1 AND s.shop_id IN ( 160288176 , 221864167 ) LIMIT 5000
queryList.5: hp_master: SELECT mp.product_id,mp.original_price,mp.sort,p.shop_id, p.country,p.product_img,p.product_price, p.product_name,p.product_sale_type,p.product_status, hdpsn.sale_num_last_30_day as product_sale_num, p.block_type,p.is_special,p.menu_id, IFNULL(pds.score,0) score FROM module_activity_link_product mp LEFT JOIN module_activity_base mb ON mp.module_activity_base_id = mb.id LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = mp.product_id LEFT JOIN hp_data_product_sale_num hdpsn on p.product_id = hdpsn.product_id LEFT JOIN hp_product_score pds on mp.product_id=pds.product_id and pds.scene_type = 2 WHERE mp.sts = 1 AND mb.`status` = 1 AND mb.sts = 1 AND p.is_del = 0 AND p.product_status != 1 AND mp.module_activity_base_id = 2411 AND p.shop_id IN ( 160288176 , 221864167 ) ORDER BY pds.score DESC LIMIT 0,300
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716816
queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT a.shop_id, b.discount_sn, b.date_type, b.day_limit, b.time_limit, b.time_slot_type, b.crowd, c.sub_state, c.break_type, d.city FROM hp_delivery_discount_shop a LEFT JOIN hp_delivery_discount b ON a.discount_sn = b.discount_sn LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config c ON b.activity_sn = c.activity_sn LEFT JOIN shop d on a.shop_id=d.shop_id WHERE b.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND b.discount_status = 1 AND b.start_time <= 1748944173536 AND b.end_time > 1748944173536 AND a.shop_id IN ( 221864167 ) AND 1748944173536 between a.start_time and a.end_time

queryList.15: hp_master: select start_time,end_time from week_time where is_del = 0 and shop_id = 221864167 and week = '星期三'
queryList.16: hp_master: select ps.product_sku_id,ps.product_id, ps.product_sku_name, ps.value_name, ps.product_sku_price,ps.is_default,ps.platform_price,ps.is_default_spec,p.`buy_limit_min`, p.is_special,p.menu_id,p.shop_id from product_sku ps, product p where ps.`product_id` = p.`product_id` AND ps.product_id in ( 82098782 , 82098784 , 82098786 , 82098788 , 82098790 , 82458992 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 , 82458997 , 82458998 ) and ps.is_del=0 and ps.status = 1 and p.is_del = 0 order by ps.product_sku_id limit 6000
queryList.17: hp_master: select a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.product_id, a.sku_id, a.promote_price, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.limit_purchase_num, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.discount_dimension, e.shop_contribution_rate, c.stock_num, c.lock_num, g.sub_state, hpd.discount_type, hpd.discount_limit, e.discount_value, g.break_type, e.threshold, hpd.is_threshold_limit, hpd.use_channel from hp_product_sku_price as a, hp_product_discount as hpd, hp_sku_promote_stock as c, hp_product_discount_detail as e, `hp_activity_config` as g where a.promote_sn = hpd.discount_sn and a.promote_sn = c.promote_sn and a.sku_id = c.sku_id and a.promote_type = c.promote_type and hpd.status = 1 and hpd.sts = 1 and a.promote_sn = e.discount_sn and a.sku_id = e.sku_id and e.status = 1 and hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` and a.product_id in ( 82098782 , 82098784 , 82098786 , 82098788 , 82098790 , 82458992 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 , 82458997 , 82458998 ) AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 , 8 , 10 ) and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748944173 and a.end_time > 1748944173 and a.start_hour <= 17 and a.end_hour > 17 and a.start_week_day <= 2 and a.end_week_day >= 2
queryList.18: hp_master: SELECT p.product_id, a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.menu_id, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.shop_contribution_rate, hpd.discount_type, e.discount_value, hpd.discount_dimension, hpd.discount_limit, e.limit_purchase_num, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.threshold, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.start_hour, a.end_hour, a.start_week_day, a.end_week_day, g.sub_state, g.break_type FROM (select shop_id,product_id,menu_id from product where product_id in ( 82098782 , 82098784 , 82098786 , 82098788 , 82098790 , 82458992 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 , 82458997 , 82458998 ) ) p, hp_shop_menu_discount_price a, hp_shop_menu_discount_detail e, hp_product_discount hpd, `hp_activity_config` as g WHERE p.menu_id = a.menu_id AND p.menu_id = e.menu_id AND hpd.discount_sn = a.promote_sn AND hpd.discount_sn = e.discount_sn AND hpd.`status` = 1 AND hpd.sts = 1 AND e.`status` = 1 AND hpd.discount_dimension = 2 AND hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 , 8 , 10 ) and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748944173 and a.end_time > 1748944173 and a.start_hour <= 17 and a.end_hour > 17 and a.start_week_day <= 2 and a.end_week_day >= 2
queryList.19: hp_master: SELECT p.product_id, a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.menu_id, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.shop_contribution_rate, hpd.discount_type, e.discount_value, hpd.discount_dimension, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.discount_limit, e.limit_purchase_num, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.start_hour, a.end_hour, a.start_week_day, a.end_week_day, g.sub_state, g.break_type, hpd.threshold, hpd.is_threshold_limit FROM (select shop_id,product_id,menu_id from product where product_id in ( 82098782 , 82098784 , 82098786 , 82098788 , 82098790 , 82458992 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 , 82458997 , 82458998 ) ) p, hp_shop_menu_discount_price a, hp_shop_menu_discount_detail e, hp_product_discount hpd, `hp_activity_config` as g WHERE p.shop_id = a.shop_id AND p.shop_id = e.shop_id AND hpd.discount_sn = a.promote_sn AND hpd.discount_sn = e.discount_sn AND hpd.`status` = 1 AND hpd.sts = 1 AND e.`status` = 1 AND hpd.discount_dimension = 3 AND hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 , 8 , 10 ) and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748944173 and a.end_time > 1748944173 and a.start_hour <= 17 and a.end_hour > 17 and a.start_week_day <= 2 and a.end_week_day >= 2
